description_long: This hammer features a robust, industrial design with a large, rectangular metallic head adorned with mechanical gears and bolts, giving it a steampunk aesthetic. One side of the head is fitted with a prominent cogwheel, while the opposite side is reinforced with metal plates and rivets. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a textured grip, and ends with a smaller gear at the base, suggesting both functionality and decorative intent. The metallic surfaces are weathered, showing a patina of rust and wear, which adds to its rugged, utilitarian appearance. The hammer's construction appears to be primarily metal, with intricate mechanical details and exposed fasteners. Its overall form and embellishments suggest it could be used as a heavy-duty tool or as a prop in a themed urban or industrial environment.
description: A heavy, steampunk-inspired hammer with a large metal head, gear embellishments, and a textured cylindrical handle. The surfaces are weathered and industrial, with visible bolts and mechanical details.
description_view_0: This view highlights the gear on the right side of the hammer's head and the detailed mechanical components on the face, as well as the textured handle.
description_view_1: From this angle, the hammer's head appears rectangular and symmetrical, with the handle extending directly downward and the gear details less visible.
description_view_2: This side view shows the opposite face of the hammer, with the gear on the left and the reinforced metal plates and bolts on the right.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a circular mechanical pattern on the back of the hammer's head and the pointed end of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical metal handle wrapped with a textured, possibly leather grip; straight and robust with gear detail at the base.
attribute_head_type: Large, rectangular sledge-type head with mechanical gear embellishments and reinforced metal plates; one side features a prominent cogwheel.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible weathering, rust, and patina on metal surfaces; no major dents or chips.
